title: Reddit (RDDT) Valuation Check As Meta’s Forum Launch And Insider Selling Hit Sentiment
description:
Meta Platforms’ launch of Forum, a stand-alone discussion app targeting Reddit’s core communities business, sent Reddit (RDDT) shares lower. The pullback was intensified by reported insider selling and a recent regulatory fine.
See our latest analysis for Reddit.
Beyond the immediate reaction to Meta’s Forum launch, Reddit’s share price return has been under pressure, with the stock down 41.43% year to date and softer over 30 and 7 days, even though the 1 year total shareholder return is...

title: Reddit (RDDT) Faces Meta Rival, U.K. Fine, Insider Sales: How Durable Is Its Moat?
description:
In recent days, Reddit has faced fresh pressure as Meta launched a competing “Forum” app, regulators in the U.K. imposed a fine, and senior executives executed sizable pre-planned share sales. 
This mix of competitive threat, regulatory scrutiny and insider activity is drawing attention to how resilient Reddit’s business model and governance really are. 
Next, we’ll examine how Meta’s new Forum app could influence Reddit’s long-term investment narrative built around engagement and AI data...

title: Why Reddit (RDDT) Stock Is Nosediving
description: Shares of online community and discussion platform Reddit (NYSE:RDDT) fell 5.9% in the afternoon session after sentiment weakened following reports of a new competing app from Meta Platforms, significant insider selling, and a regulatory fine.
